description: Canonical local defaults matching root docker-compose.env.example (no secrets). publicBaseUrl/mcpUrl use localhost for Compose-style wiring; for host dev with pnpm dev, the browser and MCP against the public app should use the HTTPS origin from `portless get app.ctxpipe` (see root AGENTS.md). Optional overrides: copy to worktrees.local.json (gitignored) or add only what differs.

entries.notes: Matches default CTXPIPE_* ports. Linked worktrees: backend db:migrate sources scripts/worktree-db.sh for DATABASE_URL in the migrate shell only — optionally mirror databaseUrl in worktrees.local.json.
